name: Explaining Weather Bulletins via ILP

description: arXiv:2607.21184v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Inductive Logic Programming (ILP) originated within the Logic Programming community in the Nineties as a framework for combining symbolic learning with declarative knowledge representation. Nowadays, mature ILP frameworks exist and they are capable of learning complex, non-monotonic hypotheses, thus broadening both the modeling capabilities and th...
author: Enrico Santi (University of Udine, DMIF), Alessandro Dal Pal\`u (University of Parma, SMFI), Agostino Dovier (University of Udine, DMIF), Talissa Dreossi (University of Udine, DMIF), Andrea Formisano (University of Udine, DMIF)
